assertions.text: Opens with a compelling hook, not This project is a...
Craft and methodology are described, not just outcomes
Closing paragraph adds meaning rather than repeating the opening

compelling-hook.note: Opens with the image of a town losing its newspaper, not a project description

craft-described.note: 12-community shoot with crew of three described; original research methodology detailed

closing-significance.note: Closes with broader significance of news deserts for democracy

compelling-hook.note: Opens with a question or surprising statistic about sleep, not project title

craft-described.note: Production methodology briefly described despite minimal input

closing-significance.note: Closing adds broader significance about science communication

compelling-hook.note: Opens with the sound or experience of a phone recording, not the project title

craft-described.note: Ethical methodology for handling crisis recordings described in detail

closing-significance.note: Closes with significance for documentary as a human rights tool
